title: Hardcore Hearts+
description: Simply turns every heart into their Hardcore Variant.
body:
![Hardcore Hearts+](https://i.imgur.com/OdxbaZy.png)
### A polished Vanilla+ overhaul for Minecraft hearts.

This resource pack replaces Minecraft's default hearts with hardcore styled variants while keeping the vanilla aesthetic.

✔ Normal hearts  
✔ Poison hearts  
✔ Wither hearts  
✔ Absorption hearts  

---
